value.found_quote: Today, we're introducing Prompt Caching, allowing developers to reduce costs and latency. By reusing recently seen input tokens, developers can get a 50% discount and faster prompt processing times.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes OpenAI's Prompt Caching feature in the API, which caches repeated/recently seen context (input tokens) to reduce both cost (50% discount on cached input tokens) and latency. It was launched on October 1, 2024, is automatically applied to supported models, and is described as generally available — matching the claim of "Prompt / context caching (Cache repeated context to cut latency and cost.)"
